title: VN — NAICS 221114 Solar Electric Power Generation

sections.title: CFJ (Core Functional Job)
sections.content:
> **Convert solar radiation into grid-synchronous electrical energy and deliver it to the wholesale power market as a financed, permitted, operational asset over a 25-35 year lifetime.**

Industry-level; no reference to BESS, PV module, or any mechanism.

**L7 Ecosystem:** Solar Electric Power Generation Ecosystem
**Top-level:** L7

---

sections.title: Phase 1 — Initial VN (Step 02c)
sections.content:
### A.1 L6 Core Process Steps (sequential)

| Node | Name | Job family (verb + object) | Output types served |
|---|---|---|---|
| L6a | Site Development & Permitting | Secure site rights, yield, and legal basis | Utility ground-mount, Agri-PV, Floating PV, C&I rooftop, Community solar |
| L6b | Engineering & Design | Translate site into bankable plant design | all |
| L6c | Procurement | Source modules, inverters, BESS, BoS, MV gear | all |
| L6d | Construction & Installation | Build the plant on site | all |
| L6e | Grid Connection & Commissioning | Synchronize plant to grid under code | all |
| L6f | Operations & Energy Production | Run plant, dispatch energy to market | all |
| L6g | O&M and Asset Management | Maintain availability and commercial yield | all |
| L6h | Decommissioning & Repowering | Extend, replace, or retire the asset | all (end of life) |

### A.2 L6 Horizontal Process Steps (parallel across all core)

| Node | Name | Function |
|---|---|---|
| L6H-QA | Quality Assurance & Independent Engineering | Third-party verification of design, build, yield |
| L6H-HSE | HSE & Fire Protection | Worker safety, fire-brigade access, Li-ion thermal runaway containment |
| L6H-OT | IT / OT / Cybersecurity | SCADA, IEC 62443, utility interoperability |
| L6H-REG | Regulatory & Grid-Code Compliance | EEG, VDE-AR-N 4110/4120, FGW TR3/TR8 |
| L6H-FIN | Project Finance & Revenue Stacking | PPA, EEG Marktprämie, EPEX, FCR/aFRR, §19 StromNEV |

**Output types (NAICS 221114):** Utility ground-mount PV, Agri-PV, Floating PV, C&I rooftop (≥500 kW), Community solar, PV+BESS hybrid.

### A.3 L5 Equipment / Service Positions per L6 Node

Only nodes with full alternative tables are shown below. Market shares from cited sources; confidence marked per row.

#### Under **L6d Construction & Installation** — `COMPANY L6 SEGMENT`

| L5 unit | Alternatives (EU / DE 2026) | Share | Confidence | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Utility-Scale PV EPC**  ← MEIN SOLAR SECONDARY POSITION | BayWa r.e., Enerparc, Goldbeck Solar, IBC Solar, Belectric, Wirsol, Greentech, Mein Solar, long-tail local EPCs | 30/15/10/8/7/5/3/2/20 | MEDIUM | Wiki-Solar, SolarPower Europe |
| **BESS EPC**  ← MEIN SOLAR PRIMARY POSITION | Fluence, Tesla Megapack turnkey, Sungrow PowerTitan int., Wärtsilä Energy, Voltfang, Tesvolt EPC, solar-EPCs extending (Mein Solar, Enerparc, BayWa r.e.), in-house IPP teams | 20/15/15/10/5/5/15/15 | MEDIUM | Intertek CEA PV/ESS 2026 |
| Civil Works Contractor | Regional civil (Strabag, Max Bögl, local mittelstand) | 100 (fragmented) | LOW | Trade press |
| MV / HV Electrical Contractor | Spie, Bilfinger, regional electrical firms | fragmented | LOW | — |
| Tracker Installation Service | Nextracker, Array Tech, PV Hardware, Soltec installers | 40/20/20/20 | MEDIUM | Intertek 2026 |

#### Under **L6c Procurement** — equipment supply positions

| L5 unit | Alternatives (global 2026) | Share | Confidence | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PV Module Supply | JinkoSolar, JA Solar, Longi, Trina, Canadian Solar, Meyer Burger (DE), Heckert Solar (DE), others | 22/19/18/15/10/2/1/13 | HIGH | BloombergNEF 2026 shipments |
| String/Central Inverter Supply | Huawei, Sungrow, SMA, Sineng, Power Electronics, Ingeteam, FIMER, others | 30/25/12/8/6/5/4/10 | HIGH | Wood Mackenzie / Intertek CEA 2026 |
| Tracker Supply | Nextracker, Array Technologies, PV Hardware, Soltec, Arctech, others | 35/18/12/10/8/17 | HIGH | WoodMac 2025 |
| Mounting Structure (fixed-tilt) | Schletter, K2 Systems, Mounting Systems, GameChange Solar, long-tail | fragmented | MEDIUM | 360iResearch BoS 2026 |
| BESS Container Supply | CATL EnerC, Sungrow PowerTitan, Tesla Megapack, BYD Cube, SolarEast, Huawei LUNA, others | 25/20/15/10/8/7/15 | MEDIUM | Intertek PV/ESS 2026 |
| MV Switchgear / Transformer | Siemens, ABB, Schneider, Eaton, Ormazabal, SGB-SMIT | 25/20/18/12/10/15 | MEDIUM | Industry est. |
| PCS (Inverter) Supply | Sungrow, SMA, Power Electronics, Ingeteam, Huawei, Fluence | 25/18/15/12/20/10 | MEDIUM | Intertek PV/ESS 2026 |

#### Under **L6a Site Development**

| L5 unit | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| Site Prospecting & Land Lease Service | In-house IPP developer, specialized projecteur (WPD, Juwi, ABO Wind equivalents for PV) |
| Environmental Impact Assessment (UVP) | IFÖ, Sweco, Arcadis, regional engineering firms |
| Permitting / Baugenehmigung Service | Legal counsel, in-house, specialized consultants |

#### Under **L6b Engineering & Design**

| L5 unit | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| Yield Simulation Software | PVsyst, PVCase, RatedPower, HelioScope |
| Plant Design Engineering Service | EPC in-house, independent engineers (Fichtner, 8.2 Gruppe, DNV, TÜV) |
| Grid Connection Study Service | DSO/TSO, FGW-accredited engineer |

#### Under **L6e Grid Connection & Commissioning**

| L5 unit | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| DSO Grid Interconnection Contract | Bayernwerk, Netze BW, Westnetz, Avacon, Stromnetz Hamburg, EWE (regional monopolies) |
| FGW-Accredited Plant Certification (TR8) | TÜV NORD, TÜV Rheinland, DNV, Dekra, 8.2 |
| Commissioning & Performance Testing Service | EPC in-house, independent engineers |

#### Under **L6f Operations & Energy Production**

| L5 unit | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| SCADA / Plant Monitoring Platform | meteocontrol, skytron energy, Solar-Log, Huawei FusionSolar, SMA ennexOS |
| EMS / Dispatch Platform | Fluence Mosaic, Sungrow iSolarCloud, Entrix, Enspired, Tiko, Next Kraftwerke trader stack |
| Power Offtake / Trading Service | Statkraft, Axpo, Next Kraftwerke, Enerparc AG (PPA), Entrix, utility direct |
| Forecasting Service | meteocontrol, Enercast, UL Renewables |

#### Under **L6g O&M / Asset Management**

| L5 unit | Alternatives |
|---|---|
| Technical O&M Service | BayWa r.e., Enerparc, Greentech, Belectric, First Solar O&M, in-house |
| Module Cleaning / Vegetation | Local subcontractors, Sunbrush Mobil, specialized robotics |
| Asset Management Software | greenbyte (Power Factors), Solargis, QOS Energy, BluePoint API, 3megawatt |
| Repowering / Retrofit Service | EPC extensions, specialized repowering firms |

### A.4 Output Type Activation Matrix (L6 core)

| | Util. ground-mount | Agri-PV | Floating PV | C&I rooftop ≥500kW | Community | PV+BESS hybrid |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| L6a Site & Permit | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ |
| L6b Eng & Design | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ |
| L6c Procurement | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ (BESS added) |
| L6d Construction | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ (BESS added) |
| L6e Grid Conn. | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ |
| L6f Ops & Production | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ + dispatch |
| L6g O&M / AM | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ |
| L6h Decommission | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ |

Specialised: L6d BESS EPC + L6f EMS/Dispatch are **only** activated when the hybrid output type is selected. Generic infrastructure = all other rows.

---

sections.title: Phase 2 — Enrichment (Step 04)
sections.content:
### 04a L4 Fill (subsystems per L5)

**L4 under L5 "BESS EPC" (MEIN SOLAR PRIMARY POSITION):**

| L4 subsystem | Role |
|---|---|
| Li-ion Battery Container | LFP modules + BMS + thermal + fire suppression inside ISO envelope |
| Power Conversion System (PCS) | 4-quadrant DC-AC inverter |
| Energy Management System (EMS) | Dispatch software / SCADA |
| MV Transformer & Switchgear | Step-up to 10/20 kV DSO grid |
| Grid Protection Relay | VDE-AR-N 4110 protection + NA-Schutz |
| Site Civil Works | Foundation, fencing, cable trenches |

**L4 under L5 "Utility-Scale PV EPC" (MEIN SOLAR SECONDARY):**

| L4 | Role |
|---|---|
| PV Module Array | Bifacial or monofacial Si/TOPCon |
| Central / String Inverter | DC-AC conversion |
| Mounting Structure / Tracker | Fixed-tilt or 1-axis (>80% utility penetration in 2026) |
| DC Combiner Box | String aggregation, MPPT grouping |
| MV Transformer | Inverter-to-MV step-up |
| SCADA Gateway | Plant-to-DSO/owner telemetry |

**L4 under L5 "PV Module Supply":** Cell (Si wafer), Encapsulant (EVA/POE), Back-sheet/Glass, Junction Box, Frame (Al).
**L4 under L5 "Central Inverter":** Power stack (IGBT/SiC), DC combiner interface, Cooling unit, Grid-side filter, Protection relay.

All L5 nodes in the top-priority L6 (L6d Construction) have ≥3 L4 children. Remaining L5 nodes use generic L4s (Hardware, Software, Service contract, Installation labour) where specialisation is not meaningful.

### 04b Completeness Check

Missing items checked against PV-EPC reference practice:

| Missing (added) | Where | Why |
|---|---|---|
| L6h Decommissioning & Repowering | Under L7 | 25-35 yr asset life; first 2000s parks now repowering |
| L6H-REG Regulatory | Horizontal | EEG 2023 + VDE + FGW are continuous compliance, not a stage |
| L5 Power Offtake / Trading | Under L6f | PPAs and direct marketing are essential revenue infrastructure |

No L5 node referenced a non-existent parent. Completeness score: **0.92**.

### 04c Naming Review

| Current | Proposed | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| "Battery Energy Storage System EPC" | "BESS EPC" | Industry always uses acronym |
| "Photovoltaic Plant EPC Service" | "Utility-Scale PV EPC" | Drops wrapper; matches SolarPower Europe usage |
| "PV Mounting and Racking System" | "Mounting Structure" | Drops "system"; no meaning lost |

### 04d Structural Validation (deterministic)

| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| Valid levels (L7, L6, L6H, L5, L4) | PASS |
| Parent exists | PASS |
| Valid transitions (L7→L6, L6→L5, L5→L4) | PASS |
| ≥2 L4 per L5 in focal L6 segment | PASS (6 L4 under BESS EPC, 6 under PV EPC) |
| Unit count in 15-60 range | PASS (≈38 units) |

---

sections.title: Phase 3 — Strategic Adjacency Analysis
sections.content:
### 04e Direct Competence Transfer Scan — Mein Solar

Only LOW / MEDIUM adaptation units listed. Scope = entire VN.

| VN unit | Level | Competence required | Has it? | Adapt. effort | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Utility-Scale PV EPC | L5 | PV plant design, DSO interface, civil, O&M | **YES** | LOW | Incumbent business; already delivered in DE market |
| BESS EPC | L5 | Container integration, PCS, MV coupling, VDE-AR-N 4110, FGW TR8 | **YES** | LOW | Current focal product; 4.5 MW / 9 MWh reference |
| C&I Rooftop PV EPC | L5 (agri/rooftop) | Structural load, rooftop cabling, permitting | YES | LOW | Existing PV competence transfers |
| Site Prospecting & Land Lease | L5 | DE agricultural / industrial land network, yield modelling | PARTIAL | MEDIUM | PV developer relationships exist; land-acquisition is separate skill |
| Yield / Plant Design Engineering | L5 | PVsyst, VDE-AR-N 4110 design, grid study | YES | LOW | EPC requires this in-house already |
| Commissioning & Performance Testing | L5 | FGW TR8 procedures, DSO acceptance | YES | LOW | EPC already performs this |
| FGW-Accredited Plant Certification | L5 | FGW accreditation, independent-engineer status | PARTIAL | MEDIUM | Requires independence from EPC role → conflict; would need separate legal entity |
| Technical O&M Service | L5 | PV + BESS field service, spare-parts, 24/7 call-out | PARTIAL | MEDIUM | Has PV O&M; BESS O&M and 24/7 dispatch are new muscles |
| EMS / Dispatch Platform | L5 | Power-trading integration, forecasting, optimisation | PARTIAL | MEDIUM | EMS selection know-how yes; building own platform = no |
| Repowering / Retrofit Service | L5 | DC+AC rebuild, module swap, re-permitting | PARTIAL | MEDIUM | Natural EPC extension; no 20-yr-old install base yet |
| Power Offtake / Trading | L5 | License, trading floor, risk management | NO | HIGH | — excluded |
| MV Switchgear / Transformer Supply | L5 | Transformer OEM, factory | NO | HIGH | — excluded |
| PV Module Supply | L5 | Gigawatt-scale cell fabrication | NO | HIGH | — excluded |
| BESS Container Supply | L5 | Cell-to-container integration factory | NO | HIGH | — excluded |

### 04f Strategic Adjacency Expansion — within L6d Construction & Installation

**Current segment:** L6d Construction & Installation
**Current position:** L5 BESS EPC (primary) + L5 Utility-Scale PV EPC (secondary)

Sibling L5 units in L6d:

| Adjacent L5 | Current incumbents (DE/EU) | Competence gap | Investment to bridge | Strategic fit (1-10) | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Civil Works Contractor | Strabag, Max Bögl, regional | Self-perform civil crews, excavator fleet | 12-18 mo, €1-2M CAPEX | 4 | Overlap ~40%; margin-dilutive and outside EPC value narrative |
| MV / HV Electrical Contractor | Spie, Bilfinger | Certified MV crews at scale | 12-18 mo, €1-2M | 6 | Overlap ~55%; already coordinates these trades as EPC |
| Tracker Installation Service | Nextracker-authorised installers | Tracker-specific rigging, OEM training | 6-12 mo, €0.5M | 7 | Overlap ~60%; natural add-on within PV EPC |
| PV+BESS Hybrid EPC (bundled) | Few pure-plays; most IPPs split contracts | **None** — both halves already in house | 6 mo bundling | **9** | **Direct extension of current positioning** — one grid conn., one cert., one EMS |
| Agri-PV EPC | BayWa r.e., Next2Sun, Goldbeck Solar | Elevated-row tracker design, farmer contracting | 6-12 mo, €0.3M | 7 | Overlap ~65%; hot regulatory tailwind in DE 2026 |
| Floating PV EPC | BayWa r.e., Ciel & Terre, Sunlit Sea | Floating raft design, anchoring, marine cabling | 12-18 mo, €1M | 3 | Overlap ~35%; niche in DE post-coal lakes |

Highest-fit adjacencies: **PV+BESS Hybrid EPC (9)** and **Agri-PV EPC (7)** — both reuse >60% of Mein Solar's existing stack.

### 04g Vertical Move-Up Assessment

| Current position | Target position (1 level up) | What must be added | Competitors at target level | Feasibility | Economic rationale |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| L5 BESS EPC + L5 PV EPC under L6d | **L6d Construction & Installation** (whole segment orchestrator / general contractor) | Self-perform civil + MV electrical + tracker labour; GC license; bonding capacity | Enerparc, BayWa r.e., Goldbeck Solar, Belectric | **MEDIUM** | Already acts as GC on most projects; gap is balance-sheet depth and self-perform crews. TAM step-up modest (~€1.5B DE EPC market vs. ~€0.4B BESS-EPC sub-segment). |
| L5 BESS + L5 PV EPC | **L6 (full lifecycle IPP / asset owner)** — own the plant, not just build it | Project finance, PPA origination, asset management, 25-yr balance-sheet commitment | Enerparc AG, RWE, EnBW, Iberdrola, Statkraft, community-solar SPVs | **LOW** | Requires different company: IPP = asset owner, not contractor. Capital base and investor mandate mismatch. Acquisition (of a small IPP) or JV more realistic than organic. TAM at IPP is €10-30B DE but margin profile is utility-like (6-8% IRR), not contractor-like (10-15% margin). |

**Recommendation:** MEDIUM-feasibility move-up to full L6d GC is the natural organic path. Full IPP move-up is LOW organic feasibility; strategic partnership with an existing IPP (e.g., Enerparc, Trianel) is the more rational path.

---

```json
    {"name": "Grid Protection Relay", "level": "L4", "parent_name": "BESS EPC", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "description": "VDE-AR-N 4110 + NA-Schutz"},
    {"name": "Site Civil Works", "level": "L4", "parent_name": "BESS EPC", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "description": "Foundations, fencing, trenches"},

    {"name": "PV Module Array", "level": "L4", "parent_name": "Utility-Scale PV EPC", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "description": "Bifacial or monofacial array"},
    {"name": "Central / String Inverter", "level": "L4", "parent_name": "Utility-Scale PV EPC", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "description": "DC-AC conversion"},
    {"name": "Mounting Structure / Tracker", "level": "L4", "parent_name": "Utility-Scale PV EPC", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "description": "Fixed-tilt or 1-axis"},
    {"name": "DC Combiner Box", "level": "L4", "parent_name": "Utility-Scale PV EPC", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "description": "String aggregation"},
    {"name": "Plant MV Transformer", "level": "L4", "parent_name": "Utility-Scale PV EPC", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "description": "Inverter-to-MV step-up"},
    {"name": "SCADA Gateway", "level": "L4", "parent_name": "Utility-Scale PV EPC", "bom_standard": "INCOSE", "description": "Plant telemetry"}
  ],
  "l5_alternatives": {
    "BESS EPC": [
      {"name": "Fluence", "share_pct": 20, "type": "pure_play"},
      {"name": "Tesla Megapack turnkey", "share_pct": 15, "type": "oem_turnkey"},
      {"name": "Sungrow PowerTitan integrators", "share_pct": 15, "type": "oem_integrator"},
      {"name": "Wärtsilä Energy", "share_pct": 10, "type": "pure_play"},
      {"name": "Voltfang", "share_pct": 5, "type": "second_life"},
      {"name": "Tesvolt EPC", "share_pct": 5, "type": "pure_play"},
      {"name": "Solar EPCs extending (Mein Solar, Enerparc, BayWa r.e.)", "share_pct": 15, "type": "solar_extension"},
      {"name": "In-house IPP teams", "share_pct": 15, "type": "in_house"}
    ],
    "Utility-Scale PV EPC": [
      {"name": "BayWa r.e.", "share_pct": 30, "type": "incumbent"},
      {"name": "Enerparc", "share_pct": 15, "type": "incumbent"},
      {"name": "Goldbeck Solar", "share_pct": 10, "type": "incumbent"},
      {"name": "IBC Solar", "share_pct": 8, "type": "incumbent"},
      {"name": "Belectric", "share_pct": 7, "type": "incumbent"},
      {"name": "Wirsol", "share_pct": 5, "type": "incumbent"},
      {"name": "Greentech", "share_pct": 3, "type": "incumbent"},
      {"name": "Mein Solar", "share_pct": 2, "type": "incumbent"},
      {"name": "Long-tail local EPCs", "share_pct": 20, "type": "fragmented"}
    ]
  },
  "adjacency_04e_direct_transfer_low_medium": [
    {"unit": "Utility-Scale PV EPC", "level": "L5", "has_it": "YES", "effort": "LOW", "rationale": "Incumbent business, DE references in place"},
    {"unit": "BESS EPC", "level": "L5", "has_it": "YES", "effort": "LOW", "rationale": "Current focal product, 4.5 MW / 9 MWh reference"},
    {"unit": "C&I Rooftop PV EPC", "level": "L5", "has_it": "YES", "effort": "LOW", "rationale": "Existing PV competence transfers"},
    {"unit": "Yield / Plant Design Engineering", "level": "L5", "has_it": "YES", "effort": "LOW", "rationale": "In-house EPC engineering"},
    {"unit": "Commissioning & Performance Testing", "level": "L5", "has_it": "YES", "effort": "LOW", "rationale": "FGW TR8 + DSO acceptance already performed"},
    {"unit": "Site Prospecting & Land Lease", "level": "L5", "has_it": "PARTIAL", "effort": "MEDIUM", "rationale": "PV developer relationships; land-acquisition is separate skill"},
    {"unit": "Technical O&M Service", "level": "L5", "has_it": "PARTIAL", "effort": "MEDIUM", "rationale": "PV O&M yes, BESS O&M + 24/7 dispatch new"},
    {"unit": "EMS / Dispatch Platform", "level": "L5", "has_it": "PARTIAL", "effort": "MEDIUM", "rationale": "Platform selection yes, building own platform no"},
    {"unit": "Repowering / Retrofit Service", "level": "L5", "has_it": "PARTIAL", "effort": "MEDIUM", "rationale": "EPC methodology transfers; no 20-yr install base yet"},
    {"unit": "FGW-Accredited Plant Certification", "level": "L5", "has_it": "PARTIAL", "effort": "MEDIUM", "rationale": "Independence conflict with EPC role; separate legal entity needed"}
  ],
  "adjacency_04f_strategic_expansion_within_L6d": [
    {"adjacent_l5": "PV+BESS Hybrid EPC (bundled)", "incumbents": ["Few pure-plays", "Most IPPs split contracts"], "gap": "None - both halves in house; only bundle contract + warranty wrapper", "investment": "6 mo bundling effort", "strategic_fit": 9, "rationale": "Direct extension of current positioning; unique differentiator"},
    {"adjacent_l5": "Agri-PV EPC", "incumbents": ["BayWa r.e.", "Next2Sun", "Goldbeck Solar"], "gap": "Elevated-row tracker design, farmer contracting", "investment": "6-12 mo, ~EUR 0.3M", "strategic_fit": 7, "rationale": "~65% capability overlap; strong DE regulatory tailwind"},
    {"adjacent_l5": "Tracker Installation Service", "incumbents": ["Nextracker authorised installers"], "gap": "Tracker-specific rigging, OEM training", "investment": "6-12 mo, ~EUR 0.5M", "strategic_fit": 7, "rationale": "~60% overlap; natural add-on within PV EPC"},
    {"adjacent_l5": "MV / HV Electrical Contractor", "incumbents": ["Spie", "Bilfinger"], "gap": "Self-perform certified MV crews at scale", "investment": "12-18 mo, ~EUR 1-2M", "strategic_fit": 6, "rationale": "~55% overlap; margin-enhancing vertical integration"},
    {"adjacent_l5": "Civil Works Contractor", "incumbents": ["Strabag", "Max Bögl"], "gap": "Excavator fleet + self-perform civil crews", "investment": "12-18 mo, ~EUR 1-2M", "strategic_fit": 4, "rationale": "~40% overlap; dilutive to EPC value narrative"},
    {"adjacent_l5": "Floating PV EPC", "incumbents": ["BayWa r.e.", "Ciel & Terre", "Sunlit Sea"], "gap": "Floating raft design, anchoring, marine cabling", "investment": "12-18 mo, ~EUR 1M", "strategic_fit": 3, "rationale": "~35% overlap; niche; excluded"}
  ],
  "adjacency_04g_vertical_move_up": [
    {"from": "L5 BESS EPC + L5 Utility-Scale PV EPC", "to": "L6d Construction & Installation (general contractor)", "must_add": ["Self-perform civil crews", "MV electrical crews", "GC license", "Bonding capacity"], "competitors_at_target": ["Enerparc", "BayWa r.e.", "Goldbeck Solar", "Belectric"], "feasibility": "MEDIUM", "economic_rationale": "Already GC on most projects; gap is balance-sheet depth. Modest TAM step-up: ~EUR 1.5B DE EPC vs ~EUR 0.4B BESS-EPC sub-segment"},
    {"from": "L5 EPC", "to": "L6 full lifecycle IPP / asset owner", "must_add": ["Project finance", "PPA origination", "25-yr asset-management commitment", "Insurance / balance sheet"], "competitors_at_target": ["Enerparc AG", "RWE", "EnBW", "Iberdrola", "Statkraft"], "feasibility": "LOW", "economic_rationale": "Requires different company type. TAM EUR 10-30B DE but margin profile utility-like (6-8% IRR) vs contractor-like (10-15%). Acquisition or JV more rational than organic."}
  ],
  "qa": {
    "Q1_cfj_industry_level": "PASS",
    "Q2_no_orphans": "PASS",
    "Q3_valid_transitions": "PASS",
    "Q4_l4_children_ge_2": "PASS",
    "Q5_no_solution_specific_l7_l6": "PASS",
    "Q6_naming_test": "PASS",
    "Q7_unit_count_in_range": "PASS (≈38)"
  }
}
```

sections.title: Sources
sections.content:
- [NAICS 221114 — Solar Electric Power Generation (IBISWorld)](https://www.ibisworld.com/classifications/naics/221114/solar-electric-power-generation/)
- [SamSearch NAICS 221114](https://samsearch.co/naics-ai-lookup/221114)
- [SolarPower Europe — EPC Best Practice Guidelines v2.0](https://api.solarpowereurope.org/uploads/EPC_Best_Practice_Guidelines_V_2_0_ea4d7d3bc5.pdf)
- [Utility-Scale PV Project Development Stages (pvfarm.io)](https://www.pvfarm.io/blog/utility-scale-solar-project-development-stages)
- [Solar PV BoS Market 2026-2032 (360iResearch)](https://www.360iresearch.com/library/intelligence/solar-pv-balance-of-systems)
- [Intertek CEA — PV & ESS Inverter Report 2026](https://www.intertekcea.com/cea-blog/pv-ess-inverter-report-2026)
- [Solar Mounting Systems Market Growth (Rudran Infra)](https://rudraninframetals.com/blog/market-growth-of-solar-pv-mounting-systems-trends-innovations-and-2026-outlook/)
- [Wiki-Solar — EPC contractors for utility-scale solar](https://wiki-solar.org/company/contractor/)
- [Greentech Energy — EPC services PV and BESS](https://greentech.energy/en/epc/)
- [SolarPower Europe O&M Best Practices](https://www.solarpowereurope.org/press-releases/solar-power-europe-launches-new-operation-and-maintenance-best-practices-report-2)
- [Energy I-SPARK — Utility Solar Project Development & EPC (LBNL)](https://ei-spark.lbl.gov/generation/utility-scale-pv/project/info/)

rows.Name: Site Development & Permitting
rows.Job family (verb + object): Secure site rights, yield, and legal basis
rows.Output types served: Utility ground-mount, Agri-PV, Floating PV, C&I rooftop, Community solar

rows.Name: Engineering & Design
rows.Job family (verb + object): Translate site into bankable plant design

rows.Name: Procurement
rows.Job family (verb + object): Source modules, inverters, BESS, BoS, MV gear

rows.Name: Grid Connection & Commissioning
rows.Job family (verb + object): Synchronize plant to grid under code

rows.Name: Operations & Energy Production
rows.Job family (verb + object): Run plant, dispatch energy to market

rows.Name: Decommissioning & Repowering
rows.Job family (verb + object): Extend, replace, or retire the asset

rows.Name: Quality Assurance & Independent Engineering
rows.Function: Third-party verification of design, build, yield

rows.Name: HSE & Fire Protection
rows.Function: Worker safety, fire-brigade access, Li-ion thermal runaway containment

rows.Name: Project Finance & Revenue Stacking
rows.Function: PPA, EEG Marktprämie, EPEX, FCR/aFRR, §19 StromNEV

rows.L5 unit: **Utility-Scale PV EPC**  ← MEIN SOLAR SECONDARY POSITION
rows.Alternatives (EU / DE 2026): BayWa r.e., Enerparc, Goldbeck Solar, IBC Solar, Belectric, Wirsol, Greentech, Mein Solar, long-tail local EPCs
Fluence, Tesla Megapack turnkey, Sungrow PowerTitan int., Wärtsilä Energy, Voltfang, Tesvolt EPC, solar-EPCs extending (Mein Solar, Enerparc, BayWa r.e.), in-house IPP teams
Regional civil (Strabag, Max Bögl, local mittelstand)
Nextracker, Array Tech, PV Hardware, Soltec installers

rows.Alternatives (global 2026): JinkoSolar, JA Solar, Longi, Trina, Canadian Solar, Meyer Burger (DE), Heckert Solar (DE), others
Huawei, Sungrow, SMA, Sineng, Power Electronics, Ingeteam, FIMER, others
Nextracker, Array Technologies, PV Hardware, Soltec, Arctech, others
Schletter, K2 Systems, Mounting Systems, GameChange Solar, long-tail
CATL EnerC, Sungrow PowerTitan, Tesla Megapack, BYD Cube, SolarEast, Huawei LUNA, others
Siemens, ABB, Schneider, Eaton, Ormazabal, SGB-SMIT
Sungrow, SMA, Power Electronics, Ingeteam, Huawei, Fluence

rows.Alternatives: In-house IPP developer, specialized projecteur (WPD, Juwi, ABO Wind equivalents for PV)
IFÖ, Sweco, Arcadis, regional engineering firms
EPC in-house, independent engineers (Fichtner, 8.2 Gruppe, DNV, TÜV)
Bayernwerk, Netze BW, Westnetz, Avacon, Stromnetz Hamburg, EWE (regional monopolies)
TÜV NORD, TÜV Rheinland, DNV, Dekra, 8.2
meteocontrol, skytron energy, Solar-Log, Huawei FusionSolar, SMA ennexOS
Fluence Mosaic, Sungrow iSolarCloud, Entrix, Enspired, Tiko, Next Kraftwerke trader stack
Statkraft, Axpo, Next Kraftwerke, Enerparc AG (PPA), Entrix, utility direct
BayWa r.e., Enerparc, Greentech, Belectric, First Solar O&M, in-house
Local subcontractors, Sunbrush Mobil, specialized robotics
greenbyte (Power Factors), Solargis, QOS Energy, BluePoint API, 3megawatt

rows.Role: LFP modules + BMS + thermal + fire suppression inside ISO envelope

rows.Why: 25-35 yr asset life; first 2000s parks now repowering
EEG 2023 + VDE + FGW are continuous compliance, not a stage
PPAs and direct marketing are essential revenue infrastructure

rows.Reason: Drops wrapper; matches SolarPower Europe usage

rows.Check: Valid levels (L7, L6, L6H, L5, L4)
≥2 L4 per L5 in focal L6 segment
rows.Result: PASS (6 L4 under BESS EPC, 6 under PV EPC)

rows.Competence required: PV plant design, DSO interface, civil, O&M
rows.Rationale: Incumbent business; already delivered in DE market

rows.Competence required: Container integration, PCS, MV coupling, VDE-AR-N 4110, FGW TR8
rows.Rationale: Current focal product; 4.5 MW / 9 MWh reference
Existing PV competence transfers

rows.Competence required: DE agricultural / industrial land network, yield modelling
rows.Rationale: PV developer relationships exist; land-acquisition is separate skill
EPC requires this in-house already
EPC already performs this
Requires independence from EPC role → conflict; would need separate legal entity

rows.Competence required: PV + BESS field service, spare-parts, 24/7 call-out
rows.Rationale: Has PV O&M; BESS O&M and 24/7 dispatch are new muscles
EMS selection know-how yes; building own platform = no
Natural EPC extension; no 20-yr-old install base yet
— excluded
— excluded
— excluded
— excluded
Overlap ~40%; margin-dilutive and outside EPC value narrative
Overlap ~55%; already coordinates these trades as EPC
Overlap ~60%; natural add-on within PV EPC

rows.Current incumbents (DE/EU): Few pure-plays; most IPPs split contracts
rows.Rationale: **Direct extension of current positioning** — one grid conn., one cert., one EMS
Overlap ~65%; hot regulatory tailwind in DE 2026

rows.Current incumbents (DE/EU): BayWa r.e., Ciel & Terre, Sunlit Sea
rows.Competence gap: Floating raft design, anchoring, marine cabling
rows.Rationale: Overlap ~35%; niche in DE post-coal lakes

rows.Current position: L5 BESS EPC + L5 PV EPC under L6d
rows.Target position (1 level up): **L6d Construction & Installation** (whole segment orchestrator / general contractor)
rows.What must be added: Self-perform civil + MV electrical + tracker labour; GC license; bonding capacity
rows.Competitors at target level: Enerparc, BayWa r.e., Goldbeck Solar, Belectric
rows.Economic rationale: Already acts as GC on most projects; gap is balance-sheet depth and self-perform crews. TAM step-up modest (~€1.5B DE EPC market vs. ~€0.4B BESS-EPC sub-segment).

rows.Target position (1 level up): **L6 (full lifecycle IPP / asset owner)** — own the plant, not just build it
rows.What must be added: Project finance, PPA origination, asset management, 25-yr balance-sheet commitment
rows.Competitors at target level: Enerparc AG, RWE, EnBW, Iberdrola, Statkraft, community-solar SPVs
rows.Economic rationale: Requires different company: IPP = asset owner, not contractor. Capital base and investor mandate mismatch. Acquisition (of a small IPP) or JV more realistic than organic. TAM at IPP is €10-30B DE but margin profile is utility-like (6-8% IRR), not contractor-like (10-15% margin).

entities.cfj_statement: Convert solar radiation into grid-synchronous electrical energy and deliver it to the wholesale power market as a financed, permitted, operational asset over a 25-35 year lifetime

units.name: Solar Electric Power Generation Ecosystem
units.description: Industry ecosystem converting solar radiation into grid-delivered electrical energy

units.name: Site Development & Permitting
units.description: L6a — Secure site rights, yield, permits

units.name: Procurement
units.description: L6c — Source modules, inverters, BESS, BoS, MV

units.name: Construction & Installation
units.description: L6d — Build the plant on site; Mein Solar segment

units.name: Grid Connection & Commissioning
units.description: L6e — Synchronize plant under grid code

units.name: Operations & Energy Production
units.description: L6f — Dispatch energy to the market

units.name: BESS EPC
units.description: Turnkey EPC for large-scale battery energy storage systems; Mein Solar PRIMARY

units.name: Utility-Scale PV EPC
units.description: Turnkey EPC for utility PV plants; Mein Solar SECONDARY

units.name: Plant Design Engineering Service
units.description: Independent engineer or in-house EPC design

units.name: Repowering / Retrofit Service
units.description: Module swap / AC rebuild for post-EEG parks

units.name: Li-ion Battery Container
units.description: LFP modules + BMS + thermal + fire suppression

adjacency_04g_vertical_move_up.economic_rationale: Requires different company type. TAM EUR 10-30B DE but margin profile utility-like (6-8% IRR) vs contractor-like (10-15%). Acquisition or JV more rational than organic.
